metadata.name: liquid_state
metadata.description: Unified state management for liquid programs (user properties, cashback, volume tracking)

instructions.name: accept_admin
docs: Accept a pending admin transfer, completing the two-step handoff.

accounts.name: new_admin
docs: The pending admin who is accepting the transfer.

accounts.name: cashback_config
docs: Cashback configuration holding the admin authority

instructions.name: admin_update_user
docs: Admin updates a user's referrer/multiplier and always takes a snapshot.
# Arguments
* `args` - Optional new referrer and cashback multiplier override.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Payer for snapshot account creation

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority

accounts.name: user_properties
docs: User properties account

accounts.name: user_snapshot
docs: Snapshot account to create (always taken on admin update)

accounts.name: cashback_config
docs: Cashback configuration for admin auth check

accounts.name: user
docs: The user being updated

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA for event emission.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program.

instructions.name: cancel_admin_transfer
docs: Cancel a pending admin transfer (callable by current or pending admin).

accounts.name: authority
docs: The authority cancelling the transfer (current admin or pending admin).

accounts.name: cashback_config
docs: Cashback configuration holding the admin authority

instructions.name: close_deal
docs: Admin closes/deletes a deal, returning rent to admin.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority (receives rent refund)

accounts.name: deal
docs: Deal account to close

accounts.name: cashback_config
docs: Cashback configuration for admin auth check

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA for event emission.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

instructions.name: create_deal
docs: Admin creates an exclusive deal for a pubkey.
# Arguments
* `owner` - The pubkey this deal belongs to.
* `cashback_multiplier_bps` - Cashback multiplier in basis points (10000 = 1x).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Payer for account creation

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority

accounts.name: deal
docs: Deal account to create

accounts.name: cashback_config
docs: Cashback configuration for admin auth check

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA for event emission.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program.

instructions.name: earn_cashback
docs: Earn cashback credits (called via CPI during trades).
# Arguments
* `cashback_amount` - Base cashback amount in USD (6 decimals) before multiplier adjustment.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA from the calling program (must be liquid or liquid-swap).
Only the owning program can produce a valid signature for its PDA.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user whose cashback is being earned

accounts.name: user_properties
docs: User properties account to credit cashback to.

accounts.name: events_cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA owned by this program (liquid-state) for emitting events.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

accounts.name: cashback_config
docs: Cashback configuration for balance-based multiplier tiers.

instructions.name: initialize_config
docs: Initialize global configuration (cashback config and volume accumulators).
# Arguments
* `args` - Admin authority, cashback ranges, and trader cashback basis points.

accounts.name: payer
docs: The payer for account creation.

accounts.name: cashback_config
docs: Cashback configuration account to initialize.

accounts.name: global_curve_volume
docs: Global curve volume accumulator to initialize.

accounts.name: global_amm_volume
docs: Global AMM volume accumulator to initialize.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program.

instructions.name: initialize_token_volume
docs: Initialize a token's volume accumulator with default values.

accounts.name: payer
docs: The payer for account creation

accounts.name: mint
docs: The mint for which to create the volume accumulator

accounts.name: token_volume
docs: Token volume accumulator to be created

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program

instructions.name: initialize_user
docs: Initialize a user's properties account with default values.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user being initialized

accounts.name: user_properties
docs: User properties account to be created

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program

instructions.name: redeem_deal
docs: User redeems their referrer's deal, copying the multiplier.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user redeeming the deal

accounts.name: user_properties
docs: User properties account

accounts.name: deal
docs: The deal to redeem (must belong to user's referrer)

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA for event emission.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

instructions.name: set_cashback_mode
docs: Activates cashback spending mode for the caller.
Applies the volume-based multiplier to accumulated credits.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user activating spending mode.

accounts.name: user_properties
docs: User properties account to toggle spending mode on.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA for event emission.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

instructions.name: set_referrer
docs: User sets their referrer (one-time only).
# Arguments
* `referrer` - The referrer's public key.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user setting their referrer.

accounts.name: cosigner
docs: Protocol co-signer required to authorize referrer assignment.

accounts.name: user_properties
docs: User properties account to set the referrer on.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA for event emission.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

instructions.name: spend_cashback
docs: Spend cashback credits to offset protocol fees (called via CPI).
# Arguments
* `amount` - Maximum USD credits to spend (6 decimals).

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA from the calling program (must be liquid or liquid-swap).
Only the owning program can produce a valid signature for its PDA.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user whose cashback is being spent

accounts.name: user_properties
docs: User properties account to debit cashback from.

accounts.name: events_cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA owned by this program (liquid-state) for emitting events.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

instructions.name: take_snapshot
docs: Admin takes a snapshot of a user's volume since last snapshot.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Payer for snapshot account creation

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority

accounts.name: user_properties
docs: User properties account

accounts.name: user_snapshot
docs: Snapshot account to create

accounts.name: cashback_config
docs: Cashback configuration for admin auth check

accounts.name: user
docs: The user whose snapshot is being taken

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA for event emission.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

accounts.name: system_program

instructions.name: transfer_admin
docs: Propose transfer of admin authority to a new pubkey (two-step).
# Arguments
* `new_admin` - The proposed new admin authority public key.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Current admin authority

accounts.name: cashback_config
docs: Cashback configuration holding the admin authority

instructions.name: update_amm_volumes
docs: Update volume accumulators for AMM trades.
Called via CPI from the liquid-swap program.
# Arguments
* `usd_amount` - Trade volume in USD (6 decimals).
* `token_amount` - Trade volume in base token units.

accounts.name: payer
docs: The payer for the transaction.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA from the liquid-swap program.
Only the liquid-swap program can sign for this PDA.

accounts.name: user_properties
docs: User properties account to update volumes on.

accounts.name: global_amm_volume
docs: Global AMM volume accumulator.

accounts.name: token_volume
docs: Token-specific volume accumulator.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user whose volumes are being updated

accounts.name: mint
docs: The token mint for token-specific volume tracking

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program.

instructions.name: update_config
docs: Admin updates cashback configuration.
# Arguments
* `args` - New cashback ranges and/or trader cashback basis points.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority (must match stored admin_authority)

accounts.name: cashback_config
docs: Cashback configuration to update

instructions.name: update_curve_volumes
docs: Update volume accumulators for bonding curve trades.
Called via CPI from the liquid program.
# Arguments
* `usd_amount` - Trade volume in USD (6 decimals).
* `token_amount` - Trade volume in base token units.

accounts.name: payer
docs: The payer for the transaction.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA from the liquid program.
Only the liquid program can sign for this PDA.

accounts.name: user_properties
docs: User properties account to update volumes on.

accounts.name: global_curve_volume
docs: Global curve volume accumulator.

accounts.name: token_volume
docs: Token-specific volume accumulator.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user whose volumes are being updated

accounts.name: mint
docs: The token mint for token-specific volume tracking

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program.

docs: Admin updates a deal's cashback multiplier.
# Arguments
* `new_cashback_multiplier_bps` - New cashback multiplier in basis points (10000 = 1x).

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority

accounts.name: deal
docs: Deal account to update

accounts.name: cashback_config
docs: Cashback configuration for admin auth check

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA for event emission.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program

errors.name: AlreadySpending
errors.msg: User is already in spending mode

errors.name: NoCashbackCredits
errors.msg: User has no cashback credits to activate

errors.name: InvalidCashbackConfiguration
errors.msg: Invalid cashback configuration: ranges must be contiguous and sum to proper coverage

errors.name: ReferrerCannotBeSelf
errors.msg: Referrer cannot be the user themselves

errors.name: UnauthorizedCaller
errors.msg: Caller is not an authorized program (must be liquid or liquid-swap)

errors.name: InvalidCosigner
errors.msg: Invalid co-signer: this instruction requires protocol co-signer approval

errors.name: ReferrerNotSet
errors.msg: User does not have a referrer set

errors.name: DealReferrerMismatch
errors.msg: Deal does not belong to the user's referrer

errors.name: InvalidAdminAuthority
errors.msg: The provided admin authority is invalid

errors.name: NotPendingAdmin
errors.msg: Caller is not the pending admin

types.name: AdminUpdateUserArgs
docs: Arguments for admin-updating a user's referrer or cashback multiplier.

fields.name: new_referrer
docs: New referrer pubkey (if changing). Clears deal + resets multiplier.

fields.name: new_cashback_multiplier_bps
docs: New cashback multiplier in BPS (if overriding). Requires referrer to exist.

types.name: CashbackConfiguration
docs: Global cashback configuration
PDA: [b"cashback_config"]

fields.name: admin_authority
docs: Admin authority who can update configuration

fields.name: ranges
docs: Balance-based multiplier ranges (use len() for active count).
Thresholds refer to the user's cashback credit balance. Multiplier is
applied progressively as credits are earned, not at mode-switch.

fields.name: trader_cashback_basis_points
docs: Base trader cashback rate in basis points

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Pending admin authority for two-step transfer. None if no transfer is in progress.

types.name: CashbackRange
docs: Cashback range defining balance-based multiplier tiers.
Each range maps a cashback balance interval to a multiplier. When a user earns
cashback, the earned amount is multiplied by the tier corresponding to their
current balance. If earning crosses a tier boundary, the amount is split so
each portion receives its respective tier's multiplier.

fields.name: range_start_inclusive
docs: Lower bound of balance range (inclusive), in USD with 6 decimals

fields.name: range_end_exclusive
docs: Upper bound of balance range (exclusive), in USD with 6 decimals

fields.name: multiplier_basis_points
docs: Multiplier in basis points (10000 = 1x, 20000 = 2x)

types.name: Deal
docs: Exclusive deal created by admin for a specific pubkey (typically a referrer/influencer).
Users who are referred by this pubkey can redeem the deal to get a higher cashback multiplier.
PDA: [b"deal", owner.key()]

fields.name: owner
docs: The pubkey this deal belongs to (typically a referrer/influencer)

fields.name: cashback_multiplier_bps
docs: Cashback multiplier in basis points (10000 = 1x, 15000 = 1.5x, etc.)

fields.name: redemption_count
docs: Number of unique users who have redeemed this deal

types.name: GlobalAmmVolumeAccumulator
docs: Global volume accumulator for AMM trades
PDA: [b"global_amm_volume"]

fields.name: total_usd_volume
docs: Total USD volume across all AMM trades (6 decimals)

fields.name: total_token_volume
docs: Total token volume across all AMM trades

types.name: GlobalCurveVolumeAccumulator
docs: Global volume accumulator for bonding curve trades
PDA: [b"global_curve_volume"]

fields.name: total_usd_volume
docs: Total USD volume across all curve trades (6 decimals)

fields.name: total_token_volume
docs: Total token volume across all curve trades

types.name: InitializeConfigArgs
docs: Arguments for initializing the global cashback and volume configuration.

fields.name: admin_authority
docs: The admin authority pubkey for the cashback configuration.

fields.name: ranges
docs: Balance-based multiplier ranges for progressive cashback tiers.

fields.name: trader_cashback_basis_points
docs: Base trader cashback rate in basis points (10000 = 100%).

types.name: ReferrerInfo
docs: Referrer information attached to a user

fields.name: referrer
docs: The referrer's public key

fields.name: deal
docs: Deal PDA the user redeemed (None if no deal redeemed)

fields.name: cashback_multiplier_bps
docs: Cashback multiplier in basis points (10000 = 1x, default)

types.name: SpendCashbackResult
docs: Result of a cashback spend operation.

fields.name: spent
docs: The amount of credits actually spent (may be less than requested).

types.name: TokenVolumeAccumulator
docs: Token-specific volume accumulator (unified across curve and AMM)
PDA: [b"token_volume", mint.key()]

fields.name: mint
docs: Token mint this accumulator tracks

fields.name: total_usd_volume
docs: Total USD volume for this token (curve + AMM, 6 decimals)

fields.name: total_token_volume
docs: Total token volume for this token (curve + AMM)

fields.name: curve_usd_volume
docs: USD volume from curve trades (for analytics)

fields.name: amm_usd_volume
docs: USD volume from AMM trades (for analytics)

types.name: UpdateConfigArgs
docs: Arguments for updating the cashback configuration.

fields.name: new_ranges
docs: Optional new balance-based multiplier ranges.

fields.name: new_trader_cashback_basis_points
docs: Optional new trader cashback rate in basis points.

types.name: UserProperties
docs: User properties account tracking referrals, volumes, cashback, and snapshots
PDA: [b"user_properties", user.key()]

fields.name: referrer
docs: Referrer info (pubkey, deal, multiplier)

fields.name: total_usd_volume
docs: Total USD volume traded across both curve and AMM

fields.name: total_token_volume
docs: Total token volume traded across both curve and AMM

fields.name: cashback_credits
docs: Cashback credits (abstract credits when earning, SOL lamports when spending)

fields.name: is_spending
docs: Whether user is in spending mode (true) or earning mode (false)

fields.name: curve_usd_volume
docs: USD volume from curve trades only (for analytics)

fields.name: amm_usd_volume
docs: USD volume from AMM trades only (for analytics)

fields.name: snapshot_usd_volume
docs: USD volume accumulated since the last snapshot (resets on snapshot)

fields.name: snapshot_token_volume
docs: Token volume accumulated since the last snapshot (resets on snapshot)

fields.name: snapshot_count
docs: Number of snapshots taken for this user

fields.name: latest_snapshot
docs: PDA of the latest snapshot (head of linked list, None if no snapshots)

types.name: UserSnapshot
docs: Snapshot of a user's volume since the previous snapshot.
Connected in a linked list via `prev_snapshot`.
PDA: [b"user_snapshot", user.key(), index.to_le_bytes()]

fields.name: user
docs: The user this snapshot belongs to

fields.name: index
docs: Sequential snapshot index (0-based)

fields.name: prev_snapshot
docs: Previous snapshot PDA (None for the first snapshot)

fields.name: usd_volume
docs: USD volume accumulated during this snapshot period

fields.name: token_volume
docs: Token volume accumulated during this snapshot period

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the snapshot was taken
